mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.app_id, r.version_id, r.store_type, r.release_mode, r.release_type, r.gray_percent, r.gray_start_time, r.gray_end_time, r.release_status, r.store_release_id, r.reject_reason, r.api_request_log, r.api_response_log, r.release_time, r.finish_time, r.create_user, r.update_user, ai.app_name, ai.package_name, ai.app_description, av.version_code FROM app_release_record r LEFT JOIN app_info ai ON ai.id = r.app_id LEFT JOIN app_version av ON av.id = r.version_id AND av.app_id = r.app_id
AND ( r.store_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') OR ai.app_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') OR ai.package_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') OR ai.app_description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') OR CONCAT('', av.version_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') )
AND ai.id = #{appId}
ORDER BY r.finish_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.app_id, r.version_id, r.store_type, r.release_mode, r.release_type, r.gray_percent, r.gray_start_time, r.gray_end_time, r.release_status, r.store_release_id, r.reject_reason, r.api_request_log, r.api_response_log, r.release_time, r.finish_time, r.create_user, r.update_user, ai.app_name, ai.package_name, ai.app_description, av.version_code FROM app_release_record r LEFT JOIN app_info ai ON ai.id = r.app_id LEFT JOIN app_version av ON av.id = r.version_id AND av.app_id = r.app_id WHERE r.id = #{releaseId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.app_id, r.version_id, r.store_type, r.release_mode, r.release_type, r.gray_percent, r.gray_start_time, r.gray_end_time, r.release_status, r.store_release_id, r.reject_reason, r.api_request_log, r.api_response_log, r.release_time, r.finish_time, r.create_user, r.update_user, ai.app_name, ai.package_name, ai.app_description, av.version_code FROM app_release_record r LEFT JOIN app_info ai ON ai.id = r.app_id LEFT JOIN app_version av ON av.id = r.version_id AND av.app_id = r.app_id WHERE r.app_id = #{appId} ORDER BY r.finish_time DESC, r.release_time DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.app_id, r.version_id, r.store_type, r.release_mode, r.release_type, r.gray_percent, r.gray_start_time, r.gray_end_time, r.release_status, r.store_release_id, r.reject_reason, r.api_request_log, r.api_response_log, r.release_time, r.finish_time, r.create_user, r.update_user, ai.app_name, ai.package_name, ai.app_description, av.version_code FROM app_release_record r LEFT JOIN app_info ai ON ai.id = r.app_id LEFT JOIN app_version av ON av.id = r.version_id AND av.app_id = r.app_id WHERE r.release_status = #{releaseStatus} ORDER BY r.id ASC
